'''High Flight Beta Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that served with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]] during the [[Battle of Adumar]].

==History==
During the New Republic's successful admission of [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]] and the subsequent defense of the [[Planet/Legends|world]] from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] invasion fleet, High Flight Beta Squadron served under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], this time protecting [[Remember Derra Squadron|Remember Derra]] and [[Solar Wind Squadron]]s as well as the Adumari Blade units while they attacked the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Agonizer (starship)|''Agonizer'']]. [[High Flight Three Beta]] reported the arrival of the Imperial forces as the [[Battle of Adumar]] started. They were stationed aboard the [[Allegiance (Imperial I-class)|''Allegiance'']].<ref name="Adumar" />

==Organization==
High Flight Beta Squadron used for reconnaissance and date collection.<ref name="CSWE" /> The unit's [[High Flight Squadron crest|insignia]] featured a single [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]], the squadron's craft of choice, flying above a mountain peak.<ref name="Adumar" />

==Behind the scenes==
High Flight Beta Squadron appears in [[Aaron Allston]]'s novel ''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]''. They also have an entry in the [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
